product_overview: A frontend shopping experience where users can browse products, add items to a cart, and complete checkout with shipping details. The app also includes an admin dashboard route for authenticated administrative access.
core_goals: Add products to a shopping cart and manage cart contents
Complete checkout by entering delivery and contact information
Place an order and reach the success confirmation page

features.name: Product browsing
features.description: Users can explore the product homepage and shop catalog to find items they want to purchase.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View product categories and product listings -> Select a category -> See products update for that category
Navigate to /shop -> View the product catalog and product details -> Browse available products
Navigate to / -> Use available search or filtering controls -> See the product list refine based on the chosen criteria

features.name: Shopping cart management
features.description: Users can review items in their cart and adjust quantities or remove items before checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View products -> Add a product to the cart -> Navigate to /cart -> See the added item in the cart
Navigate to /cart -> Increase the quantity of an item -> See the cart total update
Navigate to /cart -> Decrease the quantity of an item -> See the cart total update
Navigate to /cart -> Remove an item from the cart -> See the cart update to reflect the removal

features.name: Checkout and delivery form
features.description: Users can enter shipping and contact information to submit an order and reach the confirmation page.
user_flows: Navigate to /checkout -> Fill in name -> Fill in phone number -> Fill in delivery address -> Select Wilaya -> Submit the order form -> See the success confirmation page
Navigate to /checkout -> Leave one or more required fields empty -> Submit the order form -> See validation feedback for the missing information
Navigate to /checkout -> Enter an invalid phone number -> Submit the order form -> See validation feedback for the phone number field
Navigate to /checkout -> View the stored phone number display -> See the phone number shown correctly between brackets

features.name: Add to Cart
features.description: User adds products to their shopping cart
user_interactions: Click 'Add to Cart' on a product
Navigate to /cart to see the added products

features.name: Checkout Form
features.description: User fills out checkout form and completes the order
